name: IGH_BakeAwareData
summary: Implement this interface in your IGH_Goo data type if you want to be included in baking operations.

methods.name: BakeGeometry
methods.signature: bool BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc doc, ObjectAttributes att, out Guid obj_guid)
methods.summary: Bake an object in the given Rhino document.

params.name: att
params.doc: Attributes to bake with (should not be null).

params.name: obj_guid
params.doc: The id of the baked object.

returns.doc: True on success. If False, obj_guid and obj_inst are not guaranteed to be valid pointers.
